column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing very deeply in seiza (saikeirei)" | TEXT="申し訳ございません" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Lowering her head with a pained expression" | TEXT="お許しください" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Pressing her head to the floor (dogeza style)" | TEXT="合わせる顔がございません" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking down with shadows over her eyes" | TEXT="弁解の余地もございません" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Tears falling onto her lap gracefully" | TEXT="不徳の致すところ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Handing over a letter of apology with both hands" | TEXT="誠意を尽くします" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Folding her hands in a tight grip of regret" | TEXT="猛省しております" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up with pleading, wet eyes" | TEXT="一度だけチャンスを" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing towards a closed door in the rain" | TEXT="二度と繰り返しませんわ"
